narrative:
Oliver Township (precinct in Adams County) has 689 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.4 percentage points.
